title: Book Review: Queering Families: Reproductive Justice in Precarious Times , By Tamara Lea Spira and Doing Gender Justice: Queering Reproduction, Kin, and Care , By Shui-Yin Sharon Yam and Natalie Fixmer-Oraiz Queering Families: Reproductive Justice in Precarious Times.
